title: release-state
description: Schema for .github/release-state.yaml in projectbluefin image repos (bluefin, bluefin-lts, dakota). Written by reusable-promote.yml; read by reusable-execute-release.yml.

testing.description: Map of variant name to :testing OCI digest.

^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9-]*$.description: OCI content-addressable digest for this variant's :testing tag.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this file was last updated by the promote workflow.
